proposed_solutions.description: Different categories show different calibration quality; apply category-specific adjustments
proposed_solutions.implementation: Add category-based calibration map in MarketState metadata

for_users: Avoid extreme probabilities unless you have strong evidence
Consider the market price as a baseline - large deviations should be justified
Use historical base rates for similar events as anchors
Test your fair_prob estimates on out-of-sample data before deployment
validation_rules: Flag fair_prob that differs from market_prob by >20% for review
Require additional justification for probabilities <0.15 or >0.85
Cross-validate against historical outcomes in similar markets

advanced_solution.description: Fit a calibration curve using historical (fair_prob, outcome) pairs
requirements: Need more historical data (current sample: 6 markets)
Minimum 100-200 markets recommended for reliable calibration
Re-fit calibration curve periodically as more data accumulates
advanced_solution.implementation: Create calibration.py module with fitted calibration map
